seed_text: We live in succession, in division, in parts, in particles. Meantime within man is the soul of the whole
thematic_frame: Ralph Waldo Emerson — Over-Soul, Self-Reliance, Transcendentalism
aura_sensing:
- a sticky, humming, everywhere-at-once feel.
- a web of here-yourselves-web-flow.
- something breathing, following the edge.
- parts that are all there at once.
- a tension between the whole and the little bits.
dan_extract:
How everything is connected by an invisible, humming web.
A breathing motion always following the outside edge.
claim_status: NO_CLAIM
